description.plain: A modern clamp-on LED desk lamp with edge-lit technology, adjustable brightness, and color temperature control for optimal focus and workspace ambiance.

unique_selling_points: Edge-lit LED technology delivers even, flicker-free illumination with 270-degree rotating head and USB-C/USB-A charging.
metadata.top_features:
Edge-lit LED technology provides even, flicker-free illumination for a distraction-free workspace
270-degree rotating light head allows flexible positioning to suit any workflow
Color temperature control lets users adjust ambiance from cool to warm white for personalized comfort
Dimmable LED brightness enables precise control over light intensity
Robust clamp-on design with five adjustable pivot points ensures secure and customizable mounting

Bulb Type: LED
Lighting Modes: Cool white, Daylight, Warm white
Light Pattern: Solid
Color Options: Black, White
Charging Ports: USB-C, USB-A
Adjustable Pivot Points: 5

description.plain: Introducing the Lume Cube Edge 2.0 Black LED Desk Lamp - your versatile, modern LED light companion that's a game-changer for both productivity and video appearance. Crafted to elevate your focus, flow, and ambiance. This intuitive clamp on desk lamp is the ultimate desk lighting solution for creative designers, content creators, and go-getter entrepreneurs alike. With state-of-the-art Edge-Lit LED technology, it offers evenly diffused, flicker-free illumination, creating an ideal sanctuary for focus and creativity. The minimalistic yet sturdy clamp on desk lamp design harmonizes seamlessly with your workspace's aesthetic, allowing you to keep your home or office setup distraction-free and position it wherever your workflow demands. Intuitive button controls adapt your ambiance on the fly, making it an intuitive and functional black LED desk lamp that will light up your vision. description.plain: Introducing the Lume Cube Edge 2.0 Desk Lamp with Base: your creative workspace companion. With limitless possibilities the new Lume Cube Edge 2.0 Desk Lamp is a beacon of inspiration that supercharges your artistic flair, sharpens your work productivity and radiates your entrepreneurial drive. Crafted to be your unwavering ally, this adjustable desk light elevates your focus, ambiance, and desk aesthetics. Whether you’re mastering your design, curating that perfect shot, or delivering your latest pitch on a video call, the Edge 2.0 is the ultimate desk lamp for the modern workflow. Featuring state-of-the-art Edge-Lit LED technology, this professional desk lamp offers an evenly diffused, flicker-free illumination, ensuring that your home or office desk space remains a sanctuary of productivity and creativity. No more squinting or discomfort; just pure uninterrupted brilliance for any mood. Exclusive to the Edge Light 2.0 with Base, our minimalistic weighted base blends seamlessly with your workspace’s aesthetic, allowing you to position your multi-functional desk lamp wherever your workflow demands. Adjust your ambiance on the fly with an intuitive touch-based control base. From creators, designers to entrepreneurs and everyone in between, the Lume Cube Edge 2.0 Desk Lamp is the perfect modern LED desk lamp with base that you’ve been asking for. Illuminate your vision and adapt to any task.

products.title: Circadian Rhythm Desk Lamp

description.plain: A portable, rechargeable desk lamp with three blue light-free modes and a flexible gooseneck for customizable, circadian-friendly lighting.

unique_selling_points: Three color modes, including virtually blue light-free amber and red, plus full spectrum white, for tailored circadian and sleep support.
metadata.top_features:
Three light modes: Amber 1600K, Red 625nm, Full Spectrum 4000K—each tailored for different circadian needs and activities
Virtually or completely blue light-free amber and red modes—minimizes disruption of melatonin production for better sleep
Flexible 360-degree gooseneck—places light exactly where needed for reading, work, or bedside tasks
Rechargeable 2500mAh battery—provides up to 10 hours of use on full brightness and longer at dimmer settings
Lightweight, travel-friendly design—easy to carry for use at home, in the office, or while traveling
metadata.tech_specs:
Light Modes: Amber 1600K, Red 625nm, Full Spectrum 4000K
Battery Capacity: 2500mAh rechargeable lithium-ion
LED Count: 30 non-flickering LEDs
Usage Time: Up to 10 hours at full brightness, longer at dimmer settings
Charging: USB-C, 0-100% in ~4.5 hours
Weight: Lightweight (exact weight not specified)

media.alt_text: Circadian Rhythm Desk Lamp

description.plain: Support your natural sleep-wake cycle with the Hooga Circadian Rhythm Desk Lamp, designed to promote better rest, focus, and well-being. This portable, lightweight lamp offers three light modes—amber (1600K), red (625nm), and full-spectrum white (4000K)—to suit your needs throughout the day and night. The amber and red light settings are virtually or completely free of blue light, making them ideal for use after sunset when it's important to avoid bright, blue-rich light that can suppress melatonin production and disrupt sleep. Whether you're winding down at night, tending to a baby, or reading in bed, this lamp creates a calm, sleep-friendly environment that won’t disturb your circadian rhythm—or your partner's. The flexible, 360-degree gooseneck allows you to position the light exactly where you need it, while the compact design makes it easy to take with you anywhere—from hotel rooms to campsites. A built-in 2500mAh rechargeable battery powers 30 non-flickering LEDs for up to 10 hours on full brightness, with even longer runtimes at dimmer settings. It recharges fully in about 4.5 hours via the included USB-C cable. Whether you're working late, studying, or simply prefer not to wear blue light blocking glasses, this desk lamp offers a healthier, more natural way to light your space—anytime, anywhere.

media.alt_text: Circadian Rhythm Desk Lamp

media.alt_text: Lume Cube Edge Light Go Task Light with Red Light Mode

variants.title: Lume Cube Edge Light Go Task Light with Red Light Mode

description.plain: The Edge Light Go is a portable desk lamp that delivers professional-grade cordless lighting engineered for soft, high-accuracy illumination. Advanced edge lit LED technology produces even, flattering light that is easy on the eyes and ideal for focused work, creative tasks, and video calls. Adjustable warmth, precision dimming, and integrated red light mode allow you to tailor your lighting to your environment, reduce eye strain, and support focus throughout the day. Four precision pivot points give you exact control over placement so the light hits precisely where you need it. This rechargeable desk lamp moves effortlessly between spaces, making it easy to reposition lighting anywhere in your workspace. Edge Light Go is more than a lamp. It is a performance lighting solution for modern workspaces. Key Benefits: • Professional-grade illumination – soft, well-diffused light with high color accuracy • Adaptive warmth & red light mode – tune light for energy or relaxation • Precision positioning – four pivot points for exact light placement • Wireless freedom – rechargeable with wireless charging for devices • Clutter-free design – no cords, no permanent setup

media.alt_text: Mushroom-shaped lamp next to wooden arched and wavy decor.

description.plain: Discover our cute mushroom lamp and add some seventies flair to your decor! Looking for a unique lamp to add some extra light and personality to your space? Check out our Murano mushroom lamp, the trendiest 70s item to come back in style. The shade is available in multiple colors, so you can choose the perfect one to match your decor. Cute & Beautiful The Mushroom Lamp also comes with a LED bulb, making it energy-efficient. Plus, the Murano Mushroom Table Lamp makes a great desk lamp, night light, or accent light. So if you're looking for a one-of-a-kind lighting option, the Murano Mushroom Table Lamp is a perfect choice! The perfect minimal home decor piece that you can use to upgrade any corner of your home. Available in five colors, the mushroom lamp will add a little light and color to your life and make your home as pretty as possible. Product details Material: Glass Dimensions: 19cm * 10cm Available in five colors and five plug styles: Choose from lime, pink, white, matcha, or purple, and USB, AU, US, EU, or UK plugs. We have a mushroom lamp in stock for everyone. Satisfaction Guaranteed If you are not satisfied with your product, please contact us and we will do whatever it takes to make sure you are 100% satisfied with your order. We are a proud member of 1% for the Planet. We donate 1% of our annual sales to environmental non-profits in the goal of saving wildlife. Thank you for supporting us and helping save our planet. products.title: Desk Lamp Modern Industrial 100% Metal Table Lamp 22", Soft White Light (3000K) with Adjustable Switch, Ideal for Office Bedroom Study Room Living Room Nightstand Bedside Lamps Nickel

description.plain: A tall, all-metal desk lamp with adjustable dimming and a warm white LED for versatile, energy-efficient lighting in any room.

unique_selling_points: Stepless dimming switch and adjustable height for customizable lighting in any setting.
metadata.top_features:
All-metal construction blends industrial and modern aesthetics for versatile home decor
Stepless dimming switch allows precise control of light intensity for any mood or task
Adjustable high and low positions provide flexible lighting range and height
Warm 3000K LED bulb delivers comfortable, energy-saving illumination
Sturdy electroplated metal base with rubber anti-slip pads ensures stability and safety
metadata.tech_specs:
Material: Electroplated metal
Finish: Nickel
Bulb Type: LED
Bulb Size: E26
Light Color: Warm white (3000K)
Product Dimensions: 19.49 D x 9.45 W x 22 H inches
Item Weight: 4.5 pounds

media.alt_text: Desk Lamp Modern Industrial 100% Metal Table Lamp 22", Soft White Light (3000K) with Adjustable Switch, Ideal for Office Bedroom Study Room Living Room Nightstand Bedside Lamps Nickel

variants.title: Desk Lamp Modern Industrial 100% Metal Table Lamp 22", Soft White Light (3000K) with Adjustable Switch, Ideal for Office Bedroom Study Room Living Room Nightstand Bedside Lamps Nickel

description.plain: About This Unique Metal Table Lamp: Unique design, all metal material blends industrial style with modern fashion aesthetics, finding a balance between retro and modern. Its smooth lines and modern aesthetics can be integrated into more decorations, enhancing the taste of your home decoration High Quality Materials: Our desk lamp is made of high-quality metal, combining elegance and durability. A sturdy and heavy solid circular base, with rubber anti slip pads installed at the bottom, keeps the desk lamp stable and safe in the desired position, creating a fashionable and high-quality atmosphere in your space Dimmable Switch: This tall desk lamp is equipped with a UL stepless dimming switch on the power cord, with a dimming range of 100% -0%. It is easy and fast to use, and can be controlled freely to meet your various needs for ambient light Energy Saving and Comfortable Lighting: The desk lamp is equipped with a 5W LED dimmable bulb with a soothing 3000K color temperature, providing warm and comfortable lighting for your reading and home office needs. Compared to traditional light bulbs, our energy-saving LED bulbs can save up to 85% of energy costs Your Life Partner: Modern desk lamps are designed with adjustable high and low positions, which can be adjusted according to your needs to obtain the height and light range you want to illuminate, it can work properly in many places. It is particularly suitable as a reading light for your work lamp, bedside table, and bedside table, or as a key light on the top of the coffee table in the guest room Overview Finish Type : Nickel Base Material : Electroplated metal surface Bulb Base : E26 Product Dimensions : 19.49"D x 9.45"W x 22"H Item Weight : 4.5 Pounds
